title: [Build Failed]: ESP32-S3 build that worked yesterday now fails in linker, no code changes
body:
I have a project that built and flashed successfully yesterday afternoon (about 5pm UTC). This morning every build of the same project fails in the linker phase. I haven't touched the code, haven't updated IDF, haven't changed sdkconfig.

Error snippet:
```
undefined reference to `lvgl_port_init'
collect2: error: ld returned 1 exit status
```

I tried: `idf.py fullclean && idf.py build` — same failure. Tried from a fresh git clone — same failure.

IDF version pinned at v5.5 via `.espctl.toml`. Job ID from this morning's failure: `job_abc12345`. Happy to share full build log.
_notes: Has Job ID, has reproduction, has 'worked yesterday/fails today' shape — strong real_bug signal. AI should acknowledge + ask for any remaining missing info (full log).
